prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次依次为约160名、285名、243名、232名、294名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2025年基准位次约294名，较2024年（232名）后移62名，为近五年最低位次最大值；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2024年均为11人，2025年增至12人；2026年计划大幅扩招至32人，较2025年增加20人（+167%），为近年最大幅度扩招。大幅扩招意味着录取名额显著增加，竞争压力相对缓解，位次预计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续位居第7名（全国Top7），属C9联盟顶尖高校，办学层次极高，对高分考生具有持续强吸引力；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世，其曾为中科大少年班创立做出贡献）；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（个别教授因贪污助学生入读硕士被判刑事件），对报考心理有轻微抑制作用。抖音综合热度排名第12（高热），短视频曝光量大，社会关注度高。历史投档异常记录：2021–2025年未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估A+学科8个（数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A学科3个（材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、工商管理、管理科学与工程），A-学科7个，A类学科总数达19个，基础理学与前沿工科实力极强。招生专业覆盖数学类（A+）、物理学类（A+）、计算机类（A）、电子信息类（A-）、材料类（A）等王牌学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等核心专业社会热度均为高热推荐/推荐，持续吸引高分考生报考。本省2026年普通高考总人数约29.9万，物理类考生估算约20.6万，较2025年（20.7万）基本持平，考生规模稳定。；中科大位于安徽省（非本省），在贵州省招生占比约1.5%–2.0%（2025年约9人/598总计划），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（12→32人）为最关键影响因素——扩招167%将显著缓解竞争、推动位次后移；学校C9顶尖层次与核心优势学科（数学、物理、计算机）的高热度对高分考生保持强吸引力，部分抵消扩招带来的位次后移幅度；声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用。综合权衡后，在2025年基准294名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约553名，区间490–616名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（含拔尖计划华罗庚数学科技英才班）
- 物理学类（含拔尖计划科技英才班、量子未来技术试点班）
- 计算机类（含拔尖计划华夏计算机科技英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含信息科技英才班）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 行星科学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类
- 环境科学与工程类
- 核工程类
- 经济管理试验班。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校在贵州大幅扩招至32人，位次预计明显后移。位次在预测区间（490–616名）内建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<490名）可重点冲刺数学类、物理学类、计算机类等A+学科专业；位次接近区间上限（>616名）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 160, 285, 243, 232, and 294 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 294, which is 62 places behind 2024 (232), marking the highest minimum ranking in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Guizhou Province: 11 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 12 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 32 students, an increase of 20 students (+167%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years. A substantial expansion means a significant increase in admission slots, relatively easing competition pressure, and rankings are expected to shift backward noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 7th consecutively from 2021 to 2026 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (Top 7 nationally), belonging to the C9 League of top universities, with an extremely high educational level, maintaining a strong attraction for high-scoring students. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly positive (due to the passing of Mr. Li Zhengdao, who contributed to the establishment of USTC's Special Class for the Gifted Young). During the 2026 cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to an incident where an individual professor was sentenced for corruption in helping students gain admission to master's programs), which has a mild inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 12th (high heat), with high short video exposure and social attention. Historical admission anomaly records: No obvious signal of admission gaps from 2021 to 2025. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 3 A disciplines (Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering), and 7 A- disciplines, with a total of 19 A-class disciplines, showing extremely strong strength in basic sciences and frontier engineering. Enrollment majors cover top disciplines such as Mathematics (A+), Physics (A+), Computer Science (A), Electronic Information (A-), and Materials (A).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Mathematics/Statistics are all highly recommended/recommended in social heat, continuously attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in this province is about 299,000, with an estimated 206,000 physics category students, roughly the same as 2025 (207,000), indicating a stable student population. USTC is located in Anhui Province (not this province), and its enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 1.5%–2.0% (approximately 9 out of 598 total plan in 2025), which is cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (12 to 32 students) is the most critical factor—a 167% expansion will significantly ease competition and push rankings backward. The C9 top-tier level and the high popularity of core advantageous disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science) maintain strong attraction for high-scoring students, partially offsetting the backward shift in rankings caused by expansion. The slightly negative reputation has a mild inhibitory effect. After comprehensive weighing, based on the 2025 baseline of 294, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 553, with a range of 490–616.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics (including the Top-Notch Program Hua Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Talent Class)
- Physics (including the Top-Notch Program Science and Technology Talent Class, Quantum Future Technology Pilot Class)
- Computer Science (including the Top-Notch Program Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including the Information Science and Technology Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Planetary Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Nuclear Engineering
- Economics and Management Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university significantly expands enrollment in Guizhou to 32 students, and rankings are expected to shift backward noticeably. For rankings within the predicted range (490–616), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 top majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<490), focus on sprinting for A+ discipline majors such as Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science. For rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>616), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
